argv: Wide static shot in a quiet kitchen: a creamy off-white tilt-head stand mixer with a polished brushed-metal mixing bowl sits centered on a thick butcher-block counter. A woman's hand enters frame from the right and gently places a single brown egg on the wood beside the mixer, then withdraws. The mixer does not move. Background: soft-focus white shaker cabinets, a sprig of rosemary in a glass jar, brushed brass tap. 50 mm full-frame, medium framing, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Extreme macro inside a brushed steel mixing bowl: a polished spiral dough hook turns slowly, folding a pale buttery dough over and over itself, soft golden specks of flour suspended in the air. Light glints off the burnished steel of the hook. Very shallow depth of field. The hook completes one slow rotation through the shot, no cuts. 50 mm full-frame, medium framing, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait

Slow dolly backward in a warmly lit kitchen. A creamy off-white tilt-head stand mixer holds the center of frame, its iconic curved silhouette unchanged as the camera retreats inch by inch. Soft morning haze in the air. At the very end of the shot, a woman's hand reaches in from the right and gently lifts the tilt-head of the mixer open. Background: out-of-focus shaker cabinets, a wooden cutting board, a single sprig of rosemary. 50 mm full-frame, medium framing, warm morning window light camera-left at 3200K, deep brown-and-cream palette, gentle film grain, A24 domestic-warm grade, locked 9:16 portrait
warm cinematic felt-piano motif with low cello bed, slow swell, gentle and intimate, domestic-warm A24 score, no drums, no percussion, dynamic build over 12 seconds
